Created during the days before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], '''retinal combat implants''' were cybernetic implants placed within the eye of the user. They improved visual acquity as well as the tracking ability of the user.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''KotOR'', the playable character must have the implant feat at level 2.

In ''KotOR II: TSL'', the playable character must have a constitution attribute of 14 or higher.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
